252 G6F G6F_NONE_ABOVE (G6F) None of Above Modes of Transfer CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: modes of transfer in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
253 G7 G7_SEG_TASKS (G7) Task Segmentation CHAR 1 This field indicates if some or all of ADL activities were broken into subtasks during the last 7 days so that the resident could perform them. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
